difficulties.label: One-Hit
difficulties.desc: One touch and you fall. Max reward.

modes.label: Adventure
modes.blurb: Journey through biomes — 9 waves then a boss, stage after stage, ever deeper.

modes.label: Endless
modes.blurb: Survive forever — biomes cycle, hordes swell, mini-bosses crash in. Chase your best.

modes.label: Gauntlet
modes.blurb: Endless, but a full boss storms in every 8 waves — cycling all five, ever tougher.

modes.label: Playground
modes.blurb: An open arena — spawn any enemy, grab any ability at any tier, test everything.

modes.label: Tutorial
modes.blurb: Learn the blade: swings, slams, power slams, launches, juggles, updrafts, throws, parries.

modes.label: Boss Test
modes.blurb: Boss gauntlet — fight every boss in a row, evolving an ability after each.

modes.label: Enemy Test
modes.blurb: Sandbox: every enemy variant spawns from wave 1 — try the full roster.

upgrades.name: Vitality
upgrades.desc: +30 max HP, and heal 30.

upgrades.name: Keen Edge
upgrades.desc: +12% swing damage.

upgrades.name: Fleet Foot
upgrades.desc: +8% move speed, higher jump.

upgrades.name: Quick Recovery
upgrades.desc: -25% dash cooldown.

upgrades.name: Long Reach
upgrades.desc: + blade reach and length.

upgrades.name: Heavy Swing
upgrades.desc: +25% knockback, stronger launches.

upgrades.name: Deadly Throw
upgrades.desc: +20% thrown-blade damage, and it flies faster.

upgrades.name: Vampiric Edge
upgrades.desc: Swings trickle back a sliver of HP (once per swing).

upgrades.name: Air Superiority
upgrades.desc: +15% damage while airborne.

upgrades.name: Tough Hide
upgrades.desc: Take 12% less damage.

upgrades.name: Air Dash
upgrades.desc: Gain a second dash you can use in mid-air. Charges refill when you land.

upgrades.name: Bounty Hunter
upgrades.desc: +20% score from kills.

upgrades.name: Glass Cannon
upgrades.desc: +30% ALL damage (swing + throw), but you take +25% more.

upgrades.name: Bloodrite
upgrades.desc: Skill kills (slam, spike, perfect-parry) restore HP.

tierLevels.desc: Skill kills (slam, spike, perfect-parry) restore HP.
Skill kills (slam, spike, perfect-parry) restore much more HP and grant 1s of invincibility.
Skill kills (slam, spike, perfect-parry) restore massive HP and grant 1s of invincibility. Plus, EVERY normal kill now trickles HP back.

tiers.desc: Skill kills (slam, spike, perfect-parry) restore much more HP and grant 1s of invincibility.
Skill kills (slam, spike, perfect-parry) restore massive HP and grant 1s of invincibility. Plus, EVERY normal kill now trickles HP back.

upgrades.name: Riposte
upgrades.desc: After a perfect parry, take 60% less damage for 1.2s.

tierLevels.desc: After a perfect parry, take 60% less damage for 1.2s.
After a perfect parry, restore HP and take 75% less damage for 1.8s.
After a perfect parry, restore HP and become completely INVINCIBLE for 2.3s.

tiers.desc: After a perfect parry, restore HP and take 75% less damage for 1.8s.
After a perfect parry, restore HP and become completely INVINCIBLE for 2.3s.

upgrades.name: Flow Guard

tierLevels.desc: Take 30% less damage while your trick rank is BRUTAL (x3) or higher.
Take 50% less damage while your trick rank is BRUTAL (x3) or higher.
Take 50% less damage starting at STYLISH (x2). At BRUTAL (x3) or higher, you also rapidly REGENERATE HP.

tiers.desc: Take 50% less damage while your trick rank is BRUTAL (x3) or higher.
Take 50% less damage starting at STYLISH (x2). At BRUTAL (x3) or higher, you also rapidly REGENERATE HP.

upgrades.name: Aegis
upgrades.desc: Slam kills grant a shield that blocks the next hit (max 2 shields).

tierLevels.desc: Slam kills grant a shield that blocks the next hit (max 2 shields).
Slam and Perfect-Parry kills grant a shield that blocks the next hit (max 3).
Slam and Perfect-Parry kills grant a blocking shield (max 4). When a shield breaks, it erupts in a damaging shockwave.

tiers.desc: Slam and Perfect-Parry kills grant a shield that blocks the next hit (max 3).
Slam and Perfect-Parry kills grant a blocking shield (max 4). When a shield breaks, it erupts in a damaging shockwave.

upgrades.name: Phase Step

upgrades.name: Backfire

upgrades.name: Crater

upgrades.name: Aerial Rave

tierLevels.desc: Staying airborne ramps up your swing damage over time (up to +50%).
Staying airborne ramps up your swing damage much faster (up to +80%).
Staying airborne ramps up your swing damage incredibly fast (up to +130%).

tiers.desc: Staying airborne ramps up your swing damage much faster (up to +80%).
Staying airborne ramps up your swing damage incredibly fast (up to +130%).

upgrades.name: Detonate

tierLevels.desc: A thrown blade grows faster and stronger for every enemy it pierces.
A thrown blade ramps up speed and damage much harder for every pierce.
A thrown blade heavily ramps up speed and damage. Each pierce also briefly STUNS the target.

A thrown blade heavily ramps up speed and damage. Each pierce also briefly STUNS the target.

Recalling the blade tears through enemies for +140% damage.
Recalling the blade tears through enemies for +200% damage. Catching it unleashes a shockwave.

Recalling the blade tears through enemies for +200% damage. Catching it unleashes a shockwave.

tierLevels.desc: Dashing directly through enemies unleashes a damaging phase-slice.
Dashing directly through enemies unleashes a much heavier phase-slice.
Dashing directly through enemies unleashes a devastating phase-slice. If the slice kills, your dash instantly REFUNDS.

Dashing directly through enemies unleashes a devastating phase-slice. If the slice kills, your dash instantly REFUNDS.

upgrades.name: Boomerang

upgrades.name: Vortex Recall

upgrades.name: Slipstream

upgrades.name: Berserker
upgrades.desc: +25% damage while below half HP.

upgrades.name: Last Stand
upgrades.desc: Once per run, refuse to fall — rise from a killing blow with 40% HP.

upgrades.name: Whetstone
upgrades.desc: The RETURNING blade (recall) cuts +25% harder — make the catch a finisher.

upgrades.name: Gyroblade
upgrades.desc: The thrown blade flies and returns 12% faster.

upgrades.name: Quickdraw
upgrades.desc: + recall range, and the blade snaps back faster.

upgrades.name: Steady Hand
upgrades.desc: Perfect parries land more easily — a more forgiving window.

upgrades.name: Wide Guard
upgrades.desc: Deflect shots even with slower swings.

upgrades.name: Counterforce

upgrades.name: Tailwind
upgrades.desc: Higher jump and sharper air control.

upgrades.name: Kinetic Charge

upgrades.name: Bulwark

upgrades.name: Showtime

upgrades.name: Fortune

upgrades.name: Rupture
upgrades.desc: Cuts inflict BLEED—a stacking wound that damages over time.

tierLevels.desc: Cuts inflict BLEED—a stacking wound that damages over time.
Cuts inflict 2 BLEED stacks. Power Slams instantly DETONATE nearby bleed for a burst of damage.
Cuts inflict 3 BLEED stacks. Slams DETONATE bleed, and dying bleeding enemies splash their stacks onto the nearby crowd.

tiers.desc: Cuts inflict 2 BLEED stacks. Power Slams instantly DETONATE nearby bleed for a burst of damage.
Cuts inflict 3 BLEED stacks. Slams DETONATE bleed, and dying bleeding enemies splash their stacks onto the nearby crowd.

upgrades.name: Sunder
upgrades.desc: Hits MARK enemies, making them take +30% damage from all sources for 4s.

tierLevels.desc: Hits MARK enemies, making them take +30% damage from all sources for 4s.
MARKED enemies take +40% damage. Marking armored or shielded foes instantly SHATTERS their guard.
MARKED enemies take +50% damage. Marks SHATTER guards, and striking a marked foe SPREADS the mark to nearby enemies.

tiers.desc: MARKED enemies take +40% damage. Marking armored or shielded foes instantly SHATTERS their guard.
MARKED enemies take +50% damage. Marks SHATTER guards, and striking a marked foe SPREADS the mark to nearby enemies.

upgrades.name: Impale
upgrades.desc: A thrown blade PINS the first enemy hit in place, applying deep BLEED.

tierLevels.desc: A thrown blade PINS the first enemy hit in place, applying deep BLEED.
A thrown blade PINS EVERY enemy it pierces in place, applying heavier BLEED.
A thrown blade PINS EVERY enemy pierced with massive BLEED. The returning blade RIPS the wounds open, detonating the bleed.

tiers.desc: A thrown blade PINS EVERY enemy it pierces in place, applying heavier BLEED.
A thrown blade PINS EVERY enemy pierced with massive BLEED. The returning blade RIPS the wounds open, detonating the bleed.

upgrades.name: Tempo
upgrades.desc: Perfect parries grant TEMPO (+25% damage, faster speed, refreshes dash) for 4s.

tierLevels.desc: Perfect parries grant TEMPO (+25% damage, faster speed, refreshes dash) for 4s.
Perfect parries grant TEMPO (+30% damage, faster speed, refreshes dash) for 6s. Stacks up to 2 times.
Perfect parries plunge the room into deep slow-mo and grant TEMPO (+34% damage per stack, max 2, faster speed, refreshes dash).

tiers.desc: Perfect parries grant TEMPO (+30% damage, faster speed, refreshes dash) for 6s. Stacks up to 2 times.
Perfect parries plunge the room into deep slow-mo and grant TEMPO (+34% damage per stack, max 2, faster speed, refreshes dash).

upgrades.name: Backlash
upgrades.desc: A perfect parry erupts a COUNTER-SHOCK, damaging and stunning nearby enemies.

tierLevels.desc: A perfect parry erupts a COUNTER-SHOCK, damaging and stunning nearby enemies.
A perfect parry erupts a larger COUNTER-SHOCK, damaging, stunning, and MARKING nearby enemies.
A perfect parry erupts a massive COUNTER-SHOCK (damages, stuns, marks), and leaves you completely INVINCIBLE for a beat.

tiers.desc: A perfect parry erupts a larger COUNTER-SHOCK, damaging, stunning, and MARKING nearby enemies.
A perfect parry erupts a massive COUNTER-SHOCK (damages, stuns, marks), and leaves you completely INVINCIBLE for a beat.

upgrades.name: Cinder Trail
upgrades.desc: Dashing ignites enemies passed through, inflicting BURN damage over time.

tierLevels.desc: Dashing ignites enemies passed through, inflicting BURN damage over time.
Dashing inflicts a hotter BURN that damages and SLOWS enemies over time.
Dashing inflicts a massive, slowing BURN. Dying burned enemies erupt, igniting everything nearby.

tiers.desc: Dashing inflicts a hotter BURN that damages and SLOWS enemies over time.
Dashing inflicts a massive, slowing BURN. Dying burned enemies erupt, igniting everything nearby.

upgrades.name: Concussive Dash
upgrades.desc: Ending a dash erupts a shockwave that deals damage and knockback.

tierLevels.desc: Ending a dash erupts a shockwave that deals damage and knockback.
Ending a dash erupts a heavier shockwave that deals damage, knockback, and STUNS.
Ending a dash erupts a massive stunning shockwave. Hitting 2+ enemies instantly REFUNDS your dash.

tiers.desc: Ending a dash erupts a heavier shockwave that deals damage, knockback, and STUNS.
Ending a dash erupts a massive stunning shockwave. Hitting 2+ enemies instantly REFUNDS your dash.

stages.name: The Grounds
stages.lore: The Warden's badge lies in pieces. Etched inside, worn almost smooth: "Appointed by the Council of First Light. Directive: none shall reach the Undercroft." Below it, scratched by hand: "I never asked what was down there."

stages.name: The Undercroft
stages.lore: In the deepest wall of the Undercroft, beneath the mechanism that is now still, words are carved into the original stone — older than the machine: "Built to contain the Tide of Crimson. Should the Colossus fall, know this — we tried to stop it before it reached the Fields. We failed then too."

stages.name: The Crimson Fields
stages.blurb: Red and gold, and old rage.
stages.lore: Among Aldric's belongings, tucked inside the wrapping of his broken cleaver's handle: a small painted portrait, almost worn through. Two children, laughing. On the back, in handwriting read so many times the ink is barely there: "Elan and Mira — before the first Tear opened." And, in another hand: "Aldric. Come home." He never did.

stages.name: The Voidspire
stages.lore: The Voidspire is quiet for the first time. On the wall behind where The Echo stood, scratched deep over what must have been years: your name. Over and over — hundreds of times. Below them all, fresher, still sharp: "I remember what it was like to be going somewhere." And at the very bottom: "Go finish it. One of us should."

stages.name: The Tear
stages.lore: There is nothing left to carve the words into — only the quiet where the Tear used to be. You understand it now: the Source was never an enemy, only the wound the world kept reopening, wearing the shape of everyone who ever tried to close it. It wore your shape last. The blade is lighter than it has ever been. Somewhere, far above, something that has not been able to for a very long time begins, tentatively, to heal.
